name: NOCO 400
comments: Kyle Larson won the 74th running of the NOCO 400 at Martinsville Speedway, his 21st victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following cars dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reasons indicated: No. 22 (unapproved adjustments).
